title: Lead SEO Specialist at Plum Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Plum Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Plum Holdings Services! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Plum Holdings Services:
Plum Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Plum Holdings Services!
